tasks.title: Write failing homepage integration test
scope: Create the failing homepage integration test only.

tasks.title: Implement thin page and render-only HomePage UI
scope: Implement the static homepage landing UI after T001 Reviewer PASS.

Create render-only semantic homepage markup and component-scoped CSS.
Preserve /events for all discovery and creation CTAs.

No live data, new dependencies, Open Design font imports, or Open Design topnav.
readOnlyContext: Open Design MCP artifact dive-into-run-website-ui / index.html
engineerInstructions: Confirm T001 reviewed RED evidence before editing production code.
Do not add use client unless a browser-only API is proven necessary.
Render one main and one page-specific footer, and no homepage navigation landmark.
Implement responsive CSS module behavior for 375px, 768px, and 1280px.

src/app/page.jsx imports and returns HomePage only.

tasks.title: Fix tablet hero card overlap
scope: Fix 768x1024 weather chip and event card overlap in the hero scene.
Keep the fix scoped to responsive CSS for the 641-820px band unless evidence requires otherwise.
nonScope: No global layout, Navbar, or globals.css edits.
engineerInstructions: Use the Debugger root cause: at 768px max-width 1080 stretches eventCard while weatherChip keeps desktop top/left.
Add the smallest CSS media-query fix so the weather chip sits above the stretched event card at 641-820px.
Do not edit JSX or tests.
acceptanceCriteria: At 768x1024, weather chip and event card no longer overlap.
375x812 and 1280x800 visual behavior remains in scope for verifier recheck.
Focused integration, lint changed, and type-check changed remain green.

tasks.title: Fix desktop hero event and map card overlap
scope: Fix 1280x800 event card and map card overlap in the hero scene.
Keep the fix scoped to responsive CSS for desktop hero scene spacing or height.
Preserve the already passing 375x812 and 768x1024 behavior.
nonScope: No global layout, Navbar, or globals.css edits.
engineerInstructions: Use the Debugger root cause: at 1280x800, desktop base CSS keeps sceneWrap at min-height 540px while eventCard uses top alignment and mapCard uses bottom alignment in the same relative container.
Add the smallest CSS fix, preferably a 1081-1320px desktop media query that gives the hero scene enough vertical space or separates the event/map slots.
Do not edit JSX, tests, global styles, package files, or workflow state.
acceptanceCriteria: At 1280x800, event card and map card no longer overlap.
375x812 and 768x1024 remain in scope for verifier recheck.
Focused integration, lint changed, and type-check changed remain green.

evidence.engineerReport: DONE. Changed only src/ui/home/HomePage.module.css. Focused integration, lint:changed, and type-check:changed exited 0.
evidence.reviewerReport: review_passed.
